mechanics.raw_text: The survival skill encompasses all aspects of dealing with the wildemess knowledge of plants, animals, terain, naviga- tion, weather, and so forth — Boy Scout Hand- book stuff ‘Make a skill roll whenever a citizen faces critical challenge from Nature, for example when: ‘= Swimming with bulky electronic gear '* Crossing a river gorge on an improvised bridge of lashed saplings. |= * Looking for wild food (dysentery, anyone? ice, tasty mushrooms?) Dealing with cold and hot weather. ‘© Making friends with woodland creatures (yellowjackets, rattlesnakes, and skunks, 10 name a few). Wi Engineering Skills ‘Asa general rule, these skills are used in two ways: to operate the equipment and technologies associated with the specific fields listed (biosciences, chemical, electronic, mechanical or nuclear; and when a player wants to know what his character knows about 4 particular field, When a player asks for information, make a skill oll forthe relevant field, Ifthe skill roll ‘succeeds, give the player the information re- ‘quested.
